title: The Double-Up
teaching_point: When insulin doses overlap, they stack — the combined effect is stronger than either dose alone.

scenes.visual_note: Gatiep is confused about a low
scenes.subtitle_text: I had my insulin at lunch and then a snack, and now my sugar is really low. Why?
scenes.voice_text: MiraAi, I had my insulin at lunch and then a snack, and now my sugar is really low. Why?

scenes.subtitle_text: That's The Double-Up! When two doses overlap, they pile on top of each other.
scenes.voice_text: That's The Double-Up! When two doses overlap, they pile on top of each other. Look.

scenes.visual_note: Stacking overlap zone — two insulin curves piling up
scenes.subtitle_text: Both doses are active at the same time — that's why you feel it more.
scenes.voice_text: See? He's piling up right here. Both doses are active at the same time — that's why you feel it more.

scenes.subtitle_text: So it's like two waves crashing together?
scenes.voice_text: So it's like two waves crashing together?

scenes.subtitle_text: Exactly! And now you can see the wave coming before it hits.
scenes.voice_text: Exactly! And now you can see the wave coming before it hits.
